issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost component. Current DSL lacks the DON!! −1 cost mechanic; the activation cost is a critical part of the effect.

Condition logic is incomplete. The effect requires TWO conditions: (1) Leader has {GERMA 66} type AND (2) you trash this Character. Current DSL only checks board presence, missing the 'trash self' prerequisite.
Action source incomplete. Must specify PlayFromHand OR PlayFromTrash, but the card text says 'from your hand or trash' — requires dual source action or separate conditional paths.
